aeo_readiness.summary: AI models are likely to cite GreenTop Heating for local HVAC queries due to their strong local presence and decent content, but improvements in schema and conversational content are needed for better AI visibility.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema with detailed service information.
Expand conversational FAQs to address common HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories.
Regularly audit NAP listings to prevent future discrepancies.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance or installation processes.
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions and geo.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and installation guides.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQPage schema and expanding existing FAQs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the expert by creating detailed HowTo guides and publishing them with proper schema.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for the new search landscape.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Current content lacks the structured data and conversational tone that AI models prioritize.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement comprehensive schema markup, enhance conversational content, and optimize GBP for better AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: 20-30% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for GreenTop Heating Today
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to boost your visibility with AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss our AEO strategy and how it can drive more AI-driven leads to your business.
page_title: GreenTop HVAC 24/7 | Your Heating & Cooling Company
